steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Subtract $72x$ from both sides of the equation:
$$72x=72x$$
$$0=0$$

steps.title: Interpret the result
steps.content: The statement $0=0$ is always true. That means every value of $x$ satisfies the original equation, with no restriction on $x$.

steps.title: Match the number of solutions
steps.content: Exactly one and exactly two are too few because every value works. Zero solutions would require a contradiction, such as $0=5$. This equation has infinitely many solutions. The answer is C.
